headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -42.7)
key_insights: Fears trending up 60% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 120 quotes and 92 at strong intensity, driving a score of 29.0 — people are venting forcefully today.
• Despite the high strong-quote count, the score sits in the lower half of its 155-day range (–1.9 to 165.9), well below the peak of 165.9.
• Frustrations eased sharply from yesterday's 88.8, while Optimism slipped further into negative territory with few strong voices to lift it.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
